def process_status(status: str):
    if status in ["active", "pending", "suspended"]:
        handle_valid(status)
    if status not in ["error", "failed", "cancelled"]:
        proceed(status)


def categorize_size(size: int) -> str:
    if size in [1, 2, 3, 4, 5]:
        return "small"
    if size in [6, 7, 8, 9, 10]:
        return "medium"
    return "large"


def is_allowed_method(method: str) -> bool:
    return method in ["GET", "POST", "PUT", "DELETE", "PATCH"]


def should_skip_file(filename: str) -> bool:
    return filename in [".gitignore", ".env", "__pycache__", ".DS_Store"]
